title: International Network senior Strategy Analyst
description:
Responsibilitiesof the role

• Undertakeanalysis, research, modelling, forecasting & diagnosis to identifypatterns, trends or issues that may need a response, including digitalinfrastructure, technology and platform trends

• Interpretdata/outcomes to highlight business problems, risks and opportunities. Makerecommendations for consideration in the formulation of tactical andoperational plans and initiatives

• Co-ordinatepost-implementation reviews of projects or plans, and analyse their impact onthe achievement of the groups KPIs.

• Communicatefindings and make recommendations to project managers or business leaders

• Develop andundertake or contribute to research projects

GeneralNetwork Leadership Program

• Assist in theproduction of high quality feasibility analysis and business cases to supportbusiness opportunities identified in Telstra’s International Network Leadershipprogram and ensure that key stakeholders are suitably briefed throughout theapproval process.

• Assist in thedevelopment and production of Telstra’s international network strategy andgrowth plan

Costs

• Assist in theevaluation and identification of cost savings and optimisation that will allowTelstra to meet and exceed its current and future financial targets.

Procurement and rollout

• Contribute tothe assessment of impacts of strategic technology decisions on the overallnetwork efficiency and profile of costs over time

• Help formulaterecommendations on network capital investment needed to satisfy product targetsand other corporate initiatives, ensuring optimal utilisation of capital andexisting network infrastructure.

·       Expertise in building compelling, data driven business cases for technology, digital infrastructure, and AI initiatives, including detailed financial analysis, risk assessment, and scenario planning

·       Hands on experience in translating emerging tech trends (e.g., generative AI, advanced analytics, automation) into prioritised project pipelines and scalable solutions

·       Ability to bridge the gap between technical teams (e.g., engineering, facilities, and planning) and business functions, ensuring roadmaps are both strategic but executable

·       Experience as a senior Network Engineer in optical networks / optical line system build

·       Familiarity with subsea cable design and construction a plus

·       Experience with setting AI roadmaps and investment prioritisation a plus

·       Experience with senior stakeholder communication

postedCompany.description:
TELSTRA SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

Telstra Global is a leading global supplier of managed network services and international data, voice and satellite services. It is a division of the leading Australia-based, tier 1 telecommunications and media services company, Telstra Corporation Limited, and owns one of the most technologically advanced IP backbone networks in the world.

Telstra provides global telecommunications services and solutions and is an expert in bringing the advantages of customer centric managed network solutions to the business community. Together with its offshore subsidiaries and international investments, Telstra serves many the world's top companies, spanning Europe, Asia Pacific and the Americas. Telstra Global is ideally suited to provide your IT solutions, with its experience and expertise; security and reliability; trust and financial strength.

Telstra operates award-winning networks which are amongst the largest and most diverse in Asia Pacific. We have operating licences and landing rights in most major Asian markets, the US and EMEA, facilitating access to over 1,400 PoPs in 230 countries and territories.
postedCompany.name: TELSTRA SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
